neutral.name: Ashveil Grazer
neutral.description: Slow fungal herd beast.

neutral.name: Lumen Drifter
neutral.description: Bioluminescent floating jelly that provides light.

neutral.name: Rustcarapace Scuttler
neutral.description: Armored scrap cleaner.

neutral.name: Silkroot Tapper
neutral.description: Rooted resin producer.

neutral.name: Echo Chorister
neutral.description: Singing burrow colony.

neutral.name: Iron Buck
neutral.description: Metallic forest stag. Neutral unless provoked.

neutral.name: Blight Toad
neutral.description: Bloated toxic toad with paralyzing tongue.

neutral.name: Dust Devil
neutral.description: Dust-colored moth swarm. Drains moisture.

neutral.name: Ember Strider
neutral.description: Lizard-like quadruped with smoldering hide. Docile unless cornered.

neutral.name: Cinder Hound
neutral.description: Ash-colored canine with glowing ember eyes. Curious but skittish.

neutral.name: Glowfin Stalker
neutral.description: Bioluminescent cat-like amphibian that prowls neon-lit waters.

neutral.name: Ironjaw Stag
neutral.description: Metallic-antlered stag with iron-reinforced hide. Regal and calm.

neutral.name: Rustfang Wolf
neutral.description: Feral wolf with rusted metal plating along its spine. Territorial.

neutral.name: Sandglass Rattler
neutral.description: Serpent-like quadruped with glass-crystal scales that shimmer in the heat.

neutral.name: Bonegrinder
neutral.description: Massive bone-plated beetle that rolls debris through the corpse fields.

neutral.name: Toxic Salamander
neutral.description: Four-legged amphibian with dripping venom sacs. Surprisingly gentle.

neutral.name: Stormmane Elk
neutral.description: Proud elk with crackling lightning antlers. Found only in the highlands.

neutral.name: City Crawler
neutral.description: Armored scavenger that picks through ruins. Calm and steady.

neutral.name: Cinder Mite
neutral.description: Tiny ash-dwelling mite that swarms warm scrap piles.

neutral.name: Scrap Crawler
neutral.description: Thumb-sized scrap beetle that chews rusted metal.

neutral.name: Glow Leech
neutral.description: Bioluminescent leech that latches onto warm-blooded prey.

neutral.name: Heat Wisp
neutral.description: Flickering heat-mirage vermin that darts across scorched ground.

neutral.name: Spike Roller
neutral.description: Armored ball of spines that rolls into ankles.

neutral.name: Shard Hopper
neutral.description: Glass-legged hopper that skitters between crystal shards.

neutral.name: Bone Mite
neutral.description: Pale mite nesting inside sun-bleached bone piles.

neutral.name: Arc Tick
neutral.description: Static-charged tick that nests in storm-struck rock.

neutral.name: Blister Slug
neutral.description: Acid-skinned slug that leaves smoking trails through the marshes.

neutral.name: Data Rat
neutral.description: Cybernetic rat with flickering optical ports and a wire tail.

aggressive.name: Charnel Stalker
aggressive.description: Pack-hunting quadruped predator with tendrils.

aggressive.name: Voidspine Leech
aggressive.description: Parasitic energy drainer.

aggressive.name: Mycelial Behemoth
aggressive.description: Massive spore-hurling hulk.

aggressive.name: Glimmer Swarm
aggressive.description: Coordinated acidic insects.

aggressive.name: Ferroclaw Reaver
aggressive.description: Ferro-organic horror with magnetic and drilling traits.

aggressive.name: Ash Crawler
aggressive.description: Ash-colored wasteland beetle. Common in wastes, stronger in rifts.

aggressive.name: Rift Elk
aggressive.description: Large elk with glowing antlers. Neutral upworld, aggressive in rifts.

aggressive.name: Fungal Hurler
aggressive.description: Spore-throwing brute with mushroom cap.

aggressive.name: Glass Serpent
aggressive.description: Crystalline desert serpent with refractive scales.

aggressive.name: Bone Crawler
aggressive.description: Bone-armored centipede that feeds on corpses.

aggressive.name: Storm Raptor
aggressive.description: Lightning-fast highland raptor with feathered wings.

aggressive.name: Flameback Charger
aggressive.description: Aggressive burning quadruped that charges intruders without warning.

aggressive.name: Dust Lurker
aggressive.description: Camouflaged ash predator that ambushes from dust clouds.

aggressive.name: Bogmire Crawler
aggressive.description: Slimy bog predator that drags prey into toxic waters.

aggressive.name: Brambleback Beast
aggressive.description: Ironwood-thicket brute with thorny metallic vines across its back.

aggressive.name: Canyon Grinder
aggressive.description: Heavy rust-colored beetle with mandibles that crush scrap metal.

aggressive.name: Dune Prowler
aggressive.description: Lean glass-scaled predator that stalks prey across shimmering dunes.

aggressive.name: Carrion Stalker
aggressive.description: Bone-white hound that hunts in packs across the corpse fields.

aggressive.name: Miasma Toad
aggressive.description: Grotesquely swollen toad that exudes poison gas clouds.

aggressive.name: Thunderclaw Raptor
aggressive.description: Lightning-infused winged predator that strikes from storm clouds.

aggressive.name: Ruin Hound
aggressive.description: Cybernetically-enhanced feral hound that patrols ruined city streets.

aggressive.name: Ash Stalker
aggressive.description: Emaciated pale predator. Needle-teeth, vibration-sensing whiskers.

aggressive.name: Rust Hound
aggressive.description: Cyber-augmented canine with rusted spinal plating and hydraulic jaws.

aggressive.name: Phase Eel
aggressive.description: Translucent electric eel that phases between water and air.

aggressive.name: Cinder Fox
aggressive.description: Three-tailed canid with smoldering ember fur. Territorial and fast.

aggressive.name: Iron Serpent
aggressive.description: Segmented ironwood snake with bark scales and metallic fangs.

aggressive.name: Prism Viper
aggressive.description: Crystal-scaled viper with refractive facets and a laser glare.

aggressive.name: Marrow Hound
aggressive.description: Emaciated bone-white hound with exposed ribs. Pack hunter of the corpse fields.

aggressive.name: Storm Talon
aggressive.description: Winged bipedal predator with conductive feathers. Calls lightning.

aggressive.name: Fume Lurker
aggressive.description: Bloated amphibian that weeps neurotoxin fog from skin sacs.

aggressive.name: Breach Specter
aggressive.description: Partially phased canid that flickers between dimensions.

rift_only.name: Void Stalker
rift_only.description: Fast void hunter that phases in and out of reality.

rift_only.name: Abyssal Weaver
rift_only.description: Void web-spider that traps prey in reality tears.

rift_only.name: Null Shade
rift_only.description: Stealth void wraith. Shimmers between dimensions.

rift_only.name: Lifecycle Horror
rift_only.description: Regenerating life-form that splits when damaged.

rift_only.name: Spore Phantom
rift_only.description: Floating spore cloud that poisons and confuses.

rift_only.name: Arc Dynamo
rift_only.description: Orbital energy construct with lightning arcs.

rift_only.name: Rift Maw
rift_only.description: Rift core guardian. Devours anything near the core.
